results.description: Baseline with original verbose skill (v1.1.0, 180 lines + 399 lines references)

Compressed to v2.0.0-gemini-3-flash (67 lines, no references). Removed consultation framework, irrelevant schema types, validation tools, implementation guidance. Inlined Product and FAQPage JSON-LD templates with explicit rules for enumerations, numeric values, and accurate extraction.

changes: Replaced verbose v1.1.0 (579 lines across 2 files) with concise v2.0.0-gemini-3-flash (67 lines, single file)
Removed Initial Assessment, Core Principles, validation tools, implementation guidance, task-specific questions, and related skills sections
Removed references/schema-examples.md (399 lines of examples not needed for the two task types)
Retained only Product and FAQPage schema types with inline JSON-LD templates
Added explicit rules: full schema.org URLs for enumerations, numeric values for prices/ratings, accurate text extraction
